overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through an industrial district in Night City. The journey progresses from an elevated concrete walkway alongside a waterway, through an open industrial yard with massive storage tanks and smokestacks, and finally into a dark concrete underpass tunnel illuminated by artificial lights.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated industrial platform with metal overhead structures

entered.detail: large rusted steel pillars supporting overhead industrial structure
canal or water channel running alongside the walkway with concrete retaining walls
elevated concrete walkway surface with marked patterns
striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the waterway
tall futuristic skyscraper with glass facade visible in the distance
tall brick chimney emitting white smoke

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete industrial walkway with large metal support pillars casting long shadows. To the right is an industrial waterway protected by red and white barriers, while futuristic skyscrapers and a smoking industrial stack rise in the hazy distance.

events.description: approaching dark tunnel entrance beneath industrial structures

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial yard toward tunnel entrance, passing abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: massive industrial storage silos with metal staircases
network of large metal pipes and walkways spanning across the yard
derelict red sedan parked on the side of the road
large vertical advertisement screen on industrial building
dark underpass opening beneath concrete industrial structure
abandoned yellow vehicle near tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide industrial yard with massive cylindrical storage tanks and overhead pipe structures. The camera passes an abandoned red car and approaches a dark tunnel entrance beneath the industrial complex, with a large billboard visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: entering tunnel, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit, bright daylight visible ahead creating silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: walking through dark tunnel toward the bright exit light at the far end

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead near tunnel exit

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls with vertical panel patterns and metal support beams
warm orange wall-mounted lights illuminating the tunnel interior
piles of blue and yellow garbage bags accumulated along the wall
bright white light streaming from tunnel exit
yellow directional arrow sign on metal pole

segments.scene_description: Inside a long concrete tunnel illuminated by warm artificial lights mounted on the walls. Piles of trash bags line the right side as the camera walks toward the bright exit light at the far end, where a distant figure is visible walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy industrial district that transitions from an open elevated walkway into a confined concrete tunnel. It begins by moving along a concrete path flanked by massive support pillars and a waterway protected by red and white barriers, with smoking industrial stacks looming in the distance. As the path opens up, the camera enters a wide industrial yard filled with cylindrical storage tanks and overhead pipes, passing an abandoned red car and a large billboard. The scene then shifts from the open air into the mouth of a dark underpass, moving deep into a concrete tunnel illuminated by warm artificial wall lights. Finally, the camera passes piles of trash bags while heading toward a bright exit where a distant figure walks ahead.
